title: Connection Timeout Errors
description: Troubleshoot website or server connection timeout errors.
keywords: site taking too long to respond

steps.instruction: Verify your internet connection. Try loading other websites to see if the issue is with a specific site or your entire connection.
If the site requires a company network, ensure your VPN is connected and secured.
Clear your web browser cache and cookies, or try opening the site in an Incognito/Private window.
Temporarily flush your DNS: Open Command Prompt as Administrator, type `ipconfig /flushdns` and press Enter.
If the site is an external domain (e.g., a specific client portal), it may be restricted by the company firewall or experiencing its own server downtime.
